name: Rectangle
summary: The Rectangle class defines a rectangle that is a box made of four lines with orthogonal angles.

constructors.name: Rectangle
constructors.summary: Creates a new rectangle instance with two points using standard attributes. Please note that creating a rectangle using two points will re-calculate the start point to correspond with positive widths and heights.

constructors.name: Rectangle
constructors.summary: Creates a new rectangle instance with the start point and the defined width and height using standard attributes.

constructors.name: Rectangle
constructors.summary: Creates a new rectangle instance with two points using the given attributes. Please note that creating a rectangle using two points will re-calculate the start point to correspond with positive widths and heights.

constructors.name: Rectangle
constructors.summary: Creates a new rectangle instance with the start point and the defined width and height using the given attributes.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Calls the system to delete the object.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(Dictionary.String, Double..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(List.String., Dictionary.String, Double..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetDrawing
methods.summary: Gets the drawing where the drawing object is.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties(Dictionary.String, Int32..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties(List.String., Dictionary.String, Int32..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetRelatedObjects.
methods.summary: Gets the related objects of the current object.

methods.name: GetRelatedObjects(.Type.)
methods.summary: Gets the related objects of the current object that are of certain types.

methods.summary: Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetStringUserProperties(List.String., Dictionary.String, String..)
methods.summary: Retrieves all string user properties for the object with the given list of names.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.summary: Gets a double property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.summary: Gets an integer property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.summary: Gets a string property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: GetView
methods.summary: Gets the view where the drawing object is.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Calls the system to insert the new object.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

methods.name: IsSameDatabaseObject
methods.summary: Returns true if the current object and the given object are referencing the same database object.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Calls the system to update/modify the object.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Calls the system to select and retrieve the object.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Changes the string presentation of the drawing object.

properties.name: Angle
properties.summary: The angle of the rectangle. The rectangle rotates around its start point.

properties.name: EndPoint
properties.summary: The end point of the rectangle.

properties.name: Height
properties.summary: The height of the rectangle. Changing the height changes the end point with the height.

properties.name: Hideable
properties.summary: Accesses the information if this object is hidden or not or if it should be.

properties.name: QueryReturnValue
properties.summary: Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).

properties.name: StartPoint
properties.summary: The start point of the rectangle. Changing this will move the rectangle.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: The width of the rectangle. Changing the width changes the end point with the width.
